title: Medical Assistant
description: We're hiring a Medical Assistant at Syneos Health. This is an exciting opportunity to join our research-focused, regulatory-aware, precision-minded team and make a direct impact on our mission. If you have 0-2 years years of experience and are passionate about Clinical Research, we'd love to hear from you.
responsibilities: Contribute to team projects and strategic initiatives
Collaborate with cross-functional teams on deliverables
Support management with analysis and reporting
Identify process improvements and efficiency opportunities
Participate in professional development and training activities

requirements.education: High School Diploma with medical assistant certification program
